violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine ) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink ). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

Cooked chicken and beef was observed being stored in 2 DR reach in. Establishment removed from premises. Not allowed to be cooked in establishment until approval. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine ) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink ). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025
Establishment is lacking a mop sink.PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2025
Containers of chicken and pork was observed being sold from an unapproved source.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2025

( Ham and cheese) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (quat and chlorine ) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink ). New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2025
Establishment is lacking a mop sink. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2025
